name: Queen Marika
description: Queen Marika the Eternal is the reigning divine sovereign of the Lands Between, and a vessel for the Elden Ring. Her offspring possess demigod status and are bearers of the Great Runes. Ngl I haven’t been here in a while, was to busy stroking my shi, having lotion on my shi, fuck I was to horny man, smh. Not to mention shadow of the erd tree coming soon.
